a DEA format: 9 alpha-numeric characters with the first two characters alpha 
and the last seven numeric 

U = PDE prescriber ID has a UPIN format: 6 alpha-numeric characters with the first one alpha and the 
remaining numeric 

X = PDE prescriber ID is none of the above formats. PDE prescriber ID could be a valid State License 
number, an invalid prescriber identifier, or a missing prescriber ID 

COMMENT: This variable may have ascribed a different format to the prescriber identifier than
